title: El hotel de los líos. García y García 2
original_title: El hotel de los líos: García y García 2
overview: After taking over a ramshackle little hotel, bought by mistake at an auction for an exorbitant price, the Garcias live a new adventure, helped, much to their regret, by a group of gifted children who are staying at the hotel to attend the Talent Final. Together they will confront the mafioso Benito Camarena, who will try to snatch the loot hidden in the hotel from the Garcias.
